summary: Exercise the same prescription workflow used by the Docker Compose validation.
command: RX_ID="RX-K3S-$(date +%s)"; curl -fsS "$RX_API_BASE/prescriptions/${RX_ID}"; curl -fsS -X POST "$RX_API_BASE/prescriptions/${RX_ID}/approve" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"approvedBy":"demo","notes":"k3s-validation"}'; sleep 3; curl -fsS "$RX_API_BASE/prescriptions/${RX_ID}"
